description_long: This ornate chandelier features a central, bulbous body crafted from what appears to be aged brass or bronze, suspended by a sturdy chain. Twelve elegantly curved arms radiate outward in two tiers, each arm ending in a candle-like light fixture with a white, flame-shaped bulb. The arms are symmetrically arranged, giving the fixture a balanced and classical appearance. The surface of the metal is slightly matte with a patina, suggesting a vintage or antique style. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional European chandeliers, often found in grand halls or historic urban buildings. Decorative scrollwork and subtle detailing enhance its sophisticated and timeless aesthetic.
description: A vintage-style brass chandelier with twelve candle-like bulbs arranged on ornate, curved arms and suspended by a chain. The fixture features classical scrollwork and a patinated finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of all twelve arms and the central body, with the chain clearly visible above.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the depth of the central body, with the bulbs more staggered in perspective.
description_view_2: Another frontal view similar to view 0, emphasizing the even spacing of the arms and the vertical alignment of the fixture.
description_view_3: Rotated view showing the opposite side, with the arms and bulbs overlapping more, giving a sense of the fixture's three-dimensional form.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage and classical with ornate scrollwork and a patinated brass finish, evoking traditional European chandelier styles.
